'''damupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphosurid|xiphosurid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphosurid|xiphosurid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| damupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæmipith|dæmipith]] || [[word:dæmipij|dæmipij]] || [[word:dæmipish|dæmipish]] || [[word:dæmipi|dæmipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:damumuputh|damumuputh]] || [[word:damumupuj|damumupuj]] || [[word:damumupush|damumupush]] || [[word:damumupu|damumupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:damuputh|damuputh]] || [[word:damupuj|damupuj]] || [[word:damupush|damupush]] || [[word:damupu|damupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:damufputh|damufputh]] || [[word:damufpuj|damufpuj]] || [[word:damufpush|damufpush]] || [[word:damufpuf|damufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:damuputhu|damuputhu]] || [[word:damupuju|damupuju]] || [[word:damupushu|damupushu]] || [[word:damupuku|damupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:damuputh|damuputh]] || [[word:damupuj|damupuj]] || [[word:damupush|damupush]] || [[word:damupu|damupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:damuputhul|damuputhul]] || [[word:damupujul|damupujul]] || [[word:damupushul|damupushul]] || [[word:damupukul|damupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:damuputhuthu|damuputhuthu]] || [[word:damupujuju|damupujuju]] || [[word:damupushushu|damupushushu]] || [[word:damupuku|damupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:damuputhun|damuputhun]] || [[word:damupujun|damupujun]] || [[word:damupushun|damupushun]] || [[word:damupukun|damupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:damuputhuoro|damuputhuoro]] || [[word:damupujuoro|damupujuoro]] || [[word:damupushuoro|damupushuoro]] || [[word:damupukuoro|damupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
